name: Crude Charge Pump A
description: Primary feed pump for crude distillation column. History of mechanical seal failures.

name: Reflux Pump B
description: Overhead reflux pump for vacuum tower.

name: Pre-Heat Exchanger Bank
description: Crude pre-heat exchanger train. Susceptible to tube-side fouling and differential pressure buildup.

name: High Pressure Separator Vessel
description: 3-phase separator operating at 150 bar. Requires rigorous weld inspection and relief valve testing.

name: Refinery Blowdown Drum
description: Emergency blowdown collection drum for flare headers.

name: Make-up Gas Compressor
description: High pressure hydrogen compressor. Frequent valve cage wear and vibration alerts.

name: Fired Heater Furnace
description: Natural gas and fuel oil fired crude feed heater. Requires burner management system monitoring.

name: Amine Circulation Pump
description: Lean amine pump for sulfur recovery unit.

name: Condenser Bank
description: Fin-fan cooler for vacuum tower overhead vapors.
